title: Indrani
writer: Nripendrakrishna Chatterjee, Gauri Prasanna Mazumder, Achintya Kumar Sengupta
actors: Suchitra Sen, Uttam Kumar, Biman Bannerjee
plot: Unemployed and lower caste sudarshan meets and marries indrani,a brahmin and employed girl. Hismanlihood and indranies selfrespect falls into obstacles fighting continuously withthe society.
